tests.title: Cold launch shows auto-login WebView directly
tests.description: Launches the app with no cached session and verifies the Frontegg embedded login WebView appears immediately without an intermediate landing page.

tests.title: Password login and session restore
tests.description: Logs in with email/password via the auto-login WebView, verifies the profile screen, terminates, relaunches, and verifies session restore.

tests.title: Logout returns directly to auto-login WebView
tests.description: Logs in, taps logout, and verifies the app returns directly to the auto-login WebView without an intermediate landing page.

tests.title: Online logout returns to login without offline screen
tests.description: Logs out while online and verifies the no-connection page never appears during the transition back to the auto-login WebView.

tests.title: Expired access token refreshes on authenticated relaunch
tests.description: Configures a short-lived access token, waits for near-expiry, and verifies the token auto-refreshes with an incremented version.

tests.title: Scheduled token refresh fires before expiry
tests.description: Logs in with a short access token TTL and verifies the SDK's scheduled refresh fires automatically, incrementing the token version.

tests.title: Expired refresh token clears session and shows login
tests.description: Logs in with a very short refresh token TTL, waits for both tokens to expire, relaunches, and verifies the app shows the auto-login WebView.

tests.title: Relaunch with expired access token refreshes via valid refresh token
tests.description: Logs in with a very short access TTL, waits for access to expire, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed and profile appears.

tests.title: Logout clears session so relaunch shows login
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, terminates, relaunches without reset, and verifies the auto-login WebView appears.

tests.title: Authenticated relaunch enters offline mode when network path is unavailable
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches with forced offline, and verifies the profile stays visible with offline mode indicators.

tests.title: Offline mode recovers to online and profile persists
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches offline to verify offline indicators, then relaunches online and verifies recovery to the profile screen.

tests.title: Offline mode keeps user logged in with expired access token
tests.description: Logs in with a short access TTL, waits for expiry, relaunches offline, and verifies the user stays authenticated offline.

tests.title: Logout from authenticated offline mode shows no-connection or login
tests.description: Forces authenticated offline mode, logs out, and verifies the app shows either the no-connection page or the auto-login WebView.

tests.title: Offline cold launch shows no-connection or auto-login
tests.description: Launches with forced offline and no cached session, queues probe failures, and verifies the app shows either the no-connection page or the auto-login WebView.

tests.title: Retry from offline screen returns to login when network recovers
tests.description: Forces offline cold launch, verifies the no-connection state, relaunches with network available, and verifies the auto-login WebView appears.

tests.title: Cold launch with offline mode disabled reaches login quickly
tests.description: Launches with enableOfflineMode=false and verifies the auto-login WebView appears quickly without offline UI.

tests.title: Offline mode disabled preserves session during connection loss
tests.description: Logs in with offline mode disabled, relaunches, and verifies the session is preserved and profile appears.

tests.title: Password login works with offline mode disabled
tests.description: Launches with enableOfflineMode=false and completes a password login, confirming normal auth flows work.

tests.title: Transient probe timeouts do not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Queues transient startup probe timeouts and verifies the app reaches the auto-login WebView without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Post-logout relaunch transient probe failure does not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Logs out, queues transient probe failures, relaunches, and verifies the auto-login WebView appears without flashing the no-connection screen.
